title: olea europaea subsp. sylvestris
intro: Olea europaea subsp. sylvestris, also known as wild olive tree, is a subspecies of the olive tree that is native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of France. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of olea europaea subsp. sylvestris include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing protection against certain types of cancer and neurodegenerative diseases. The herbal preparations of this plant include extracts, oils, and teas, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote healthy aging.
